programs.title: General English
programs.description: Basic English language learning materials covering grammar, vocabulary, and communication.
programs.detailDescription: The General English course at SAGU Foundation builds practical communication skills in speaking, listening, reading, and writing. Offered across various levels, it features structured, interactive lessons tailored to participants' needs. The course supports everyday communication, further study, and workplace readiness, alongside specialised English for Specific Purposes (ESP) programmes designed for specific client needs.
highlights: Integrated speaking, listening, reading, and writing practice
Contextual grammar and vocabulary for daily communication
Interactive activities with feedback from tutors
idealFor: Beginner to intermediate English learners
Students preparing for higher-level English programs
Professionals who want to improve daily communication

programs.title: IELTS Preparation
programs.description: Resources specifically tailored to help individuals get ready for the IELTS exam.
programs.detailDescription: The IELTS Preparation course at SAGU Foundation is designed to develop the skills and strategies needed to achieve target scores in the IELTS test. Covering listening, speaking, reading, and writing, the course includes structured lessons, guided practice, and familiarisation with the test format and assessment criteria. It supports participants in preparing for study, work, and migration pathways that require IELTS.
highlights: Focused training for all four IELTS sections
Practice with exam-style questions and simulations
Guidance on scoring criteria and answer strategy
idealFor: Learners targeting IELTS for study or career pathways
Students applying for scholarship opportunities
Participants needing structured IELTS guidance

programs.title: TOEFL Preparation
programs.description: Materials designed to assist with preparation for the TOEFL exam.
programs.detailDescription: The TOEFL Preparation course at SAGU Foundation is designed to equip participants with the skills and strategies needed to achieve their target TOEFL scores. Covering listening, reading, speaking, and writing, the course combines structured lessons, intensive practice, and detailed familiarisation with the test format and scoring criteria. It supports participants preparing for study and professional opportunities that require TOEFL.
highlights: Skill-based preparation for TOEFL test components
Academic reading and listening comprehension drills
Writing and speaking response practice with tutor feedback
idealFor: Students preparing for international study requirements
Learners aiming to improve TOEFL performance
Participants needing exam-focused academic English support

programs.title: General English Placement Test
programs.description: Assessments designed to determine your current level of proficiency in English and place you in the appropriate learning program.
programs.detailDescription: The General English Placement Test maps each learner’s current proficiency level before class placement. This helps ensure participants enter the most suitable class level for faster progress and effective learning outcomes.
highlights: Initial proficiency mapping for accurate class placement
Assessment of grammar, vocabulary, and communication basics
Recommendation for suitable learning level and next steps
idealFor: New participants joining English programs
Learners who want to identify their current level
Students seeking personalized learning pathways

programs.title: IELTS Simulation Test
programs.description: Practice tests mimicking the structure and format of the IELTS exam.
programs.detailDescription: IELTS Simulation Test provides realistic exam simulation so participants can measure readiness before taking the official test. Through timed sessions and structured review, learners identify strengths and improvement areas clearly.
highlights: Full-format IELTS simulation experience
Timed practice to build exam stamina and confidence
Post-test review to map strengths and improvement points
idealFor: IELTS candidates nearing their test date
Learners who need readiness benchmarking
Students practicing under exam-like pressure

programs.title: TOEFL Simulation Test
programs.description: Practice exams replicating the format and content of the TOEFL test.
programs.detailDescription: TOEFL Simulation Test allows participants to experience the TOEFL structure in a controlled environment before taking the official exam. It supports readiness evaluation and helps learners adjust study priorities based on performance.
highlights: Realistic TOEFL-style test simulation
Structured scoring and readiness feedback
Focused review for targeted score improvement
idealFor: TOEFL candidates preparing for official testing
Learners needing performance diagnostics
Students finalizing exam preparation strategies

programs.title: Community Development
programs.description: Information and resources related to community-focused projects and initiatives.
programs.detailDescription: Community Development programs are designed to strengthen local capacity through education-based community initiatives. Activities are contextualized to local needs and encourage collaboration, participation, and sustainable impact.
highlights: Context-based initiatives aligned with local priorities
Community participation and collaborative implementation
Education-driven approach for long-term social impact
idealFor: Community leaders and local facilitators
Institutions seeking social-impact collaboration
Participants interested in grassroots development work

programs.title: Computer Literacy
programs.description: Resources and guidance to develop basic skills and understanding in using computers and technology effectively.
programs.detailDescription: Computer Literacy builds foundational digital skills needed for study, work, and everyday productivity. Participants learn practical computer usage, internet navigation, basic office tools, and digital communication practices.
highlights: Fundamental computer and digital navigation skills
Hands-on practice with common productivity tools
Practical digital communication and online safety awareness
idealFor: Beginners who are new to computer use
Students requiring digital readiness for learning
Community members improving employability skills

programs.title: Internship
programs.description: We welcome enthusiastic students eager to learn, collaborate, and make a difference in the lives of others.
programs.detailDescription: The Internship program offers practical learning experiences through real project involvement within SAGU Foundation activities. Interns gain exposure to teamwork, communication, and social-impact workflows while contributing to meaningful initiatives.
highlights: Hands-on experience in real program activities
Mentored learning with collaborative project tasks
Professional growth in communication and teamwork
idealFor: Students seeking practical field experience
Young professionals interested in social-impact work
Learners developing leadership and project skills

programs.title: Tutor-led ComDev Projects
programs.description: Community-based educational projects led by SAGU Foundation tutors in direct partnership with local communities.
programs.detailDescription: Tutor-led ComDev Projects are community-based initiatives where SAGU Foundation tutors lead structured educational and development activities directly within local communities. These projects are designed to address specific local needs, combining structured learning with active community participation to create meaningful and lasting impact across Papua.
highlights: Tutor-facilitated learning in community settings
Context-based activities tailored to local priorities
Collaborative approach with community stakeholders
idealFor: Community members seeking structured learning support
Local facilitators collaborating with education programs
Groups participating in SAGU Foundation initiatives

programs.title: SAGU Visits Schools
programs.description: Outreach visits to schools across Papua to deliver educational sessions and engage with students and teachers.
programs.detailDescription: SAGU Visits Schools is an outreach program where SAGU Foundation team members visit schools across Papua to deliver educational sessions, share learning resources, and engage directly with students and teachers. The program aims to bridge educational gaps and inspire students in underserved communities, building stronger connections between SAGU Foundation and local schools.
highlights: Direct school outreach across Papua communities
Educational sessions and learning resource sharing
Student and teacher engagement activities
idealFor: Schools seeking educational support and collaboration
Teachers interested in curriculum enrichment resources
Students who benefit from outreach-based learning

programs.title: SAGU Visits Communities
programs.description: Delivering educational activities and skills-building programs directly to local communities across Papua.
programs.detailDescription: SAGU Visits Communities brings SAGU Foundation's educational and development activities directly to local communities across Papua. Through structured visits, the program delivers practical learning, community dialogues, and skills-building activities designed to empower community members, strengthen local capacity, and foster a culture of continuous learning.
highlights: Structured community visits and educational activities
Skills-building programs adapted to local context
Community dialogue and participation-driven approach
idealFor: Communities seeking practical education and development support
Local leaders collaborating on community improvement
Members interested in skills development and learning

programs.title: SAGU Scholarship Club
programs.description: Structured study sessions and mentoring to prepare students in Papua for scholarship applications and opportunities.
programs.detailDescription: The SAGU Scholarship Club prepares students in Papua for scholarship applications and academic opportunities through structured study sessions, exam preparation support, and mentoring. The club connects aspiring students with resources, guidance, and a supportive peer community to help them pursue higher education goals and unlock pathways to scholarships both locally and nationally.
highlights: Scholarship application guidance and preparation support
Study sessions for academic and exam readiness
Mentoring and peer support network
idealFor: Students targeting local and national scholarship programs
Learners preparing for university entrance requirements
Youth seeking mentoring for academic advancement
